properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Let the words of my mouth, And the meditation of my heart, Be acceptable in thy sight, O LORD, my strength, And my Redeemer.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: More to be desired are they than gold, Yea, than much fine gold: Sweeter also than honey and the honeycomb.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: The law of the LORD is perfect, Converting the soul: The testimony of the LORD is sure, Making wise the simple.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: The statutes of the LORD are right, Rejoicing the heart: The commandment of the LORD is pure, Enlightening the eyes.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: The fear of the LORD is clean, Enduring for ever: The judgments of the LORD are true And righteous altogether.
